top_signals.title: Netanyahu orders Israeli military to step up attacks on Hizbollah
top_signals.summary: Far-right officials, who fear a US-Iran peace deal could rein in Israel, call for ‘high-intensity’ campaign in Lebanon
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Two LNG tankers pass through Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Another vessel carrying crude oil crossed the vital shipping lane on Saturday
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: ASX Sinks Over 10% After Revising Up Spending for Tech Upgrades
top_signals.summary: ASX Ltd. is increasing its capital spending to upgrade critical market infrastructure, as Australia’s embattled exchange operator seeks to regain the confidence of regulators and stakeholders after years of technical issues.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Former execs of AI developer Alt found guilty of window dressing
top_signals.summary: Katsuya Asai, 46, and Takayuki Ariizumi, 53, were given suspended prison sentences, and the Tokyo-based company was fined ¥300 million.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
